Thanks for contributing to Pharos. Please fill out the sections
below. The CLA bot will leave a separate comment with a signing
link — your PR can't merge until that's signed.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR does and why. The "why"
is more useful than the "what" — the diff carries the what. -->

## Linked issue / discussion

<!-- e.g. closes #123 -->

## Change category

<!-- Pick one or more. Delete the rest. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Benchmark / scoring / oracle
- [ ] Build / CI / packaging

## Test plan

<!-- How you verified the change. `gleam test` output is fine,
but for tool changes please describe the dogfood / scenario you
ran. -->

## CLA

- [ ] I have signed the CLA (see
  [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#contributor-license-agreement)).
  The CLA Assistant Lite bot will confirm this automatically once
  this PR is opened.

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Optional. Anything they should know that isn't obvious from
the diff: trade-offs you considered, follow-ups you deferred,
benchmarks you ran. -->
